name: house-merchant
summary: A well-off merchant's parlor or ground-floor living hall. Quality furniture, display of wealth that stops short of aristocratic. Account books visible.

accent.purpose: rug under central table / seating cluster

primary_palette.note: a family that eats together, hosts guests
social hearth — two good chairs facing

story_prompts: successful month — sideboard crowded with wine, fresh painting on the wall
creditors circling — ledgers open to worrying figures, no wine in decanter
host awaiting a guest — everything arranged for an impression
recently burgled — ransacked but not torn apart, specific things missing
anti_patterns: don't use coarse / dungeon-stone textures — this is a finished interior
clear floor space for entertaining — don't over-stuff the room
displays of wealth should look considered (curated), not hoarded
